title.title: Treatment or page title as shown on the page

tagline.title: One-sentence summary of the problem this treatment addresses or what it does (from page intro/hero)

narrative.title: 2-4 sentence plain-English description of how the treatment works, what crash types or safety/place issues it addresses, and key design notes. Verbatim or tightly paraphrased from the page.

crash_reduction.title: Crash-reduction statistic if quoted on the page (e.g. '47% pedestrian crashes'). Empty string if no stat is given.

image_url.title: Absolute URL of the largest representative image on the page (hero image, photograph, or diagram showing the treatment). Must be a direct image URL ending in .jpg/.jpeg/.png/.webp/.gif. Skip logos and navigation icons.

image_alt.title: Alt text or caption of that image, if available

factors.title: Which crash factors this treatment addresses. Choose from: ped, bike, intersection, lane_departure, speeding, impaired, night. Multiple OK.
